title: My full name is Varun Anand(2nd name is father's name) Pa…

messages.content:
My full name is Varun Anand(2nd name is father's name) Patkar. I am attaching a few images of my portfolio page so you cna know who i am. my socials
https://x.com/Varun_Patkar, https://github.com/Varun-Patkar, https://www.linkedin.com/in/varun-patkar/

Got it, Varun! Here's a summary of everything I've saved to your second brain:

---

**Updated — Owner Profile (`person`)**
- Full name: **Varun Anand Patkar** (Anand = father's name)
- 📍 Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- 📧 varunpatkar501@gmail.com | 📞 +91 7977802884
- 🐦 [@Varun_Patkar](https://x.com/Varun_Patkar) | 💻 [GitHub](https://github.com/Varun-Patkar) | 🔗 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/varun-patkar/)
- Bio: Data Engineer/Analyst with interest in web dev (three.js, WebLLM), AI tools, 2+ yrs experience, 20+ projects

**Created — Education (`event`)**
- BE in Information Technology, St. Francis Institute of Technology (Mumbai University), 2018–2022, **CGPA 9.1/10**

**Created — Work Experience at MAQ Software (`project`)**
- **SE1** (Jul 2023 – Mar 2026): Data engineering, Microsoft ecosystem (Python, SQL, Azure, ADF, C#)
- **SE2** (Mar 2026 – Present): Leading 3-person team on agentic AI — Copilot Studio, Microsoft Agent Framework, Azure OpenAI

**Created — Internship at The Sparks Foundation (`project`)**
- Data Science & Business Analytics Intern, Remote, May–Jun 2021 (Python, ML, Data Analysis)

**Created — CSI SFIT (`project`)**
- Technical Executive (Sep 2020 – Jul 2021) → Chairperson (Jul 2021 – Jul 2022) of Computer Society of India college chapter

The Sparks Foundation — Data Science Internship
